subcodes.first_line: O ‘Alí Akbar! Today is the Anniversary of the Martyrdom of His Holiness the Most Exalted One
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حضرت علی قبل اکبر یوم شهادت حضرت اعلی روحی لدمه المطهر الفداست الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @martyrdom of the Bab, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom
